# Tolk Runtime Source

This runtime bundle is copied from:

```text
https://github.com/boz700908/tolk
```

Release asset:

```text
https://github.com/boz700908/tolk/releases/download/release-build/tolk.zip
```

Release name:

```text
Tolk-54a0a6151c1d4dabfea306ef4025464711fd7a1d
```

Only the files from `x86/Release` and `x64/Release` are used by the foobar2000 component package.
